name: Carol's Gold Mine Pie
recipeIngredient: 14 oz Eagle Brand Sweet Condensed Milk
12 oz jar caramel ice cream topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the flaked coconut and chopped pecans to the skillet. Cook, stirring frequently until everything is golden brown.
3. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. In a separate bowl, beat together the softened cream cheese and sweet condensed milk until smooth.
5. Fold in the frozen whipped topping.
6. Pour 1/4 of the cream cheese mixture into each pie shell.
7. Drizzle 1/4 of the caramel ice cream topping over each pie.
8. Sprinkle 1/4 of the coconut mixture evenly over the pies.
9. Repeat steps 6-8 with the remaining ingredients.
10. Cover and freeze until firm, about 2 hours.
11. Remove from freezer and let stand at room temperature for 5 minutes before serving.
12. Store any leftover pie in the refrigerator for several days.
